scripts.protocol:generate: cargo run -p ctx-runtime --bin export-runtime-protocol && bun packages/tui/scripts/generate-protocol.ts
scripts.protocol:check: cargo run -p ctx-runtime --bin export-runtime-protocol -- --check && bun packages/tui/scripts/generate-protocol.ts --check
scripts.tui:smoke: cargo build -p nerve-workstation --bin nerve && bun --cwd=packages/tui run smoke -- --root ../..
